data.keyword: Where can I get child therapy in Louisville KY?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Where can I get child therapy in Louisville KY?

result.keyword: Where can I get child therapy in Louisville KY?

items.markdown:
Several practices in Louisville, KY, offer child and adolescent therapy services, including specialized pediatric care, family counseling, and behavioral health centers.[[1]](https://columbusbehavioral.com/mental-health-treatment-in-louisville-kentucky/)[[2]](https://fccwellbeing.com/clinic-locations/colorado/louisville-clinic/)[[3]](https://www.healthgrades.com/adolescent-psychiatry-pediatric-psychiatry-directory/ky-kentucky/louisville)

**Child Therapy Providers in Louisville, KY** 

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-bdb58d10d678:20)
Norton Children’s Behavioral and Mental Health 3.2 (9)  
Psychologist  
Closed 200 E Chestnut St  
Provides clinical child and adolescent psychology at 200 East Chestnut Street, Louisville, KY, and specialized pediatric psychology through their Autism Center located at 2933 Breckenridge Lane, Suite 101.

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-bdb58d10d678:21)
Wright Psychology & Counseling 4.3 (12)  
Child psychologist  
Closed 4201 Springhurst Blvd STE 203  
Offers neuropsychological assessments and therapy for children, teens, and young adults, focusing on developmental and learning concerns.

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-bdb58d10d678:22)
Creative Family Counseling 3.9 (14)  
Marriage or relationship counselor  
Closed 8134 New La Grange Rd #102  
Provides child therapy, including creative and play-based approaches, with locations in Louisville (8134 New La Grange Rd) and Prospect (12945 W U.S. Hwy 42).

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-bdb58d10d678:23)
Innovative Family Therapy 4.5 (16)  
Marriage or relationship counselor  
Closed 13121 Eastpoint Park Blvd suite f  
Specializes in child and family therapy services.

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-bdb58d10d678:24)
Meridian Behavioral Health Services 3.9 (149)  
Mental health service  
Closed 4010 Dupont Cir #419  
Offers support for children struggling with anxiety, behavioral challenges, or life transitions, with a Louisville office reachable at 502-409-6993.[](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/therapy-for-kids/) [[1]](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/therapy-for-kids/)[[2]](https://providers.nortonchildrens.com/specialty/Pediatric%20Psychology/near/Louisville%2C%20KY?page=1)[[3]](https://www.wrightchildpsychology.com/)[[4]](https://innovativefamilytherapy.com/louisville-child-therapist/)[[5]](https://meridianbhservices.com/therapy-for-kids/)

These providers specialize in addressing emotional wellness, resilience, and behavioral challenges in children.[[1]](https://www.riversidehealthcare.org/services/behavioral-health/child-and-adolescent-services)[[2]](https://entunebh.com/child-adolescent-therapy/)[[3]](https://recovery.com/childrens-wisconsin-new-berlin-psychiatry-and-behavioral-medicine-new-berlin/)[[4]](https://www.bhsva.net/childrens-mental-health/)

To help you find the best match, could you tell me a little more about what you're looking for?

- Are you looking for help with a specific concern (e.g., anxiety, behavior, autism, ADHD)?
- What is the age of the child?
- Do you prefer a certain location in Louisville or perhaps virtual appointments?
